positive: Highly detailed illustration of a stylized celestial forest scene. Central composition featuring ancient, glowing roots intertwining with geometric, ethereal constellations. Include bioluminescent flora (mushrooms, stylized ferns) and graceful, stylized animal silhouettes integrated into the landscape. The overall aesthetic should be a blend of intricate linework (tattoo flash style) and luminous digital painting. Use a rich, deep jewel-tone palette (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted strongly by glowing golden and pearlescent white light sources. The composition must be symmetrical and highly detailed, designed for seamless apparel printing, maximum contrast, and clean negative space.
negative: blurry, out of focus, low resolution, noise, grainy, deformed, extra limbs, mutated, text, signature, watermark, logo, cropped, poor anatomy, poorly rendered, mundane, childish
